spec.precondition: requires alignment > 0 && (alignment & (alignment - 1)) == 0 && offset >= 0 && offset <= SIZE_MAX - alignment && (uintptr_t)buffer + offset does not overflow
spec.postcondition: (ensures result >= offset && result % alignment == 0 && result is the smallest multiple of alignment that is >= offset when considering the buffer's base address && result <= offset + alignment - 1 && result - offset < alignment) && (result == offset + ((alignment - (((uintptr_t)buffer + offset) % alignment)) % alignment) && result % alignment == ((uintptr_t)buffer + result) % alignment && ((uintptr_t)buffer + result) % alignment == 0)
